findings.note: Repo-authored Wild Boar Proxy material is represented as AGPL-3.0-or-later.
CLIProxyAPI remains an upstream third-party engine dependency and is not relicensed by Wild Boar Proxy.
No canonical package-version source for Wild Boar Proxy was found; the UI must not display a concrete version value.
The About / License section is readonly, avoids package verification claims, and does not assert runtime truth.

blocked_risks: No canonical package metadata source exists for a truthful Wild Boar Proxy version field in this UI.
